---
title: "Coyote Hills Loop (77% Gravel)"
---



```{=html}
<article class="mobile-route-card" data-bart="Union City" data-miles="25.21" data-elevation="548.88" data-time="135" data-has-gravel="true">

<div class="mobile-route-elevation" aria-hidden="true"><img src="../data/routes/coyote-union-city/profile.svg" alt="" loading="lazy"></div>
<div class="mobile-route-metrics">
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">BART</span><br>Union City</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Miles</span><br>25.21</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Elevation Gain</span><br>548.88 ft</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Time</span><br>~2:15</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Steep Descent</span><br>0.07 mi</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Road Quality</span><br><span class="mobile-route-quality" style="background-color:#fee08b;">36%</span></p>
</div>
</article>
```
::: {.panel-tabset}

## Hazards

<iframe
  src="../data/routes/coyote-union-city/map.html"
  style="width:100%; height:min(70vh, 560px); min-height:360px; border:none;"
  loading="lazy"
  allowfullscreen
></iframe>

```{=html}
<table class="dataframe table table-striped table-sm">
  <thead>
    <tr style="text-align: left;">
      <th>Hazard</th>
      <th>Distance (mi)</th>
      <th>Percent</th>
    </tr>
  </thead>
  <tbody>
    <tr>
      <td>Flat</td>
      <td>24.43</td>
      <td>97.0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Climb</td>
      <td>0.24</td>
      <td>1.0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Steep Climb</td>
      <td>0.19</td>
      <td>1.0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Light Descent</td>
      <td>0.14</td>
      <td>1.0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Descent</td>
      <td>0.14</td>
      <td>1.0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Steep Descent</td>
      <td>0.07</td>
      <td>0.0</td>
    </tr>
  </tbody>
</table>
```

## Climbs

<iframe
  src="../data/routes/coyote-union-city/chunk_map.html"
  style="width:100%; height:min(70vh, 560px); min-height:360px; border:none;"
  loading="lazy"
  allowfullscreen
></iframe>

### Climbs Only

```{=html}
<table class="dataframe table table-striped table-sm">
  <thead>
    <tr style="text-align: left;">
      <th>Section (avg grade)</th>
      <th>Climb (ft)</th>
      <th>Distance (mi)</th>
      <th>Time (Min)</th>
    </tr>
  </thead>
  <tbody>
  </tbody>
</table>
```

### With Rest Periods

```{=html}
<table class="dataframe table table-striped table-sm">
  <thead>
    <tr style="text-align: left;">
      <th>Section (avg grade)</th>
      <th>Climb (ft)</th>
      <th>Distance (mi)</th>
      <th>Time (Min)</th>
    </tr>
  </thead>
  <tbody>
    <tr>
      <td>TOTAL</td>
      <td>0</td>
      <td>25.2</td>
      <td>135 ± 39</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>flat or descent</td>
      <td></td>
      <td>25.2</td>
      <td>135</td>
    </tr>
  </tbody>
</table>
```

## Street Quality

<iframe
  src="../data/routes/coyote-union-city/road_quality_map.html"
  style="width:100%; height:min(70vh, 560px); min-height:360px; border:none;"
  loading="lazy"
  allowfullscreen
></iframe>

```{=html}
<table class="dataframe table table-striped table-sm">
  <thead>
    <tr style="text-align: left;">
      <th>mtc_pci_info</th>
      <th>Miles</th>
      <th>Percent</th>
    </tr>
  </thead>
  <tbody>
    <tr>
      <td>Gravel</td>
      <td>19.4</td>
      <td>76.8</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Good</td>
      <td>1.3</td>
      <td>5.3</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>At Risk</td>
      <td>0.6</td>
      <td>2.5</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Fair</td>
      <td>0.6</td>
      <td>2.4</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Cycleway</td>
      <td>0.6</td>
      <td>2.3</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Very Good</td>
      <td>0.2</td>
      <td>0.7</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Poor</td>
      <td>0.1</td>
      <td>0.3</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Unknown</td>
      <td>2.5</td>
      <td>9.8</td>
    </tr>
  </tbody>
</table>
```

:::
